title: Entity Jump To Block Behavior
description: Allows an entity to jump to another random block.

cooldown_range.title: Cooldown Range
cooldown_range.description:
Minimum and maximum cooldown time-range (positive, in seconds) between each attempted jump.

Properties:
• max (float) = 0
• min (float) = 0

Sample values:
• frog: [5,7]
• goat: [30,60]
cooldown_range.x-runtime-constraint-description: Check that the limits imposed on the range (minimum, maximum and maximum distance between values) are respected

forbidden_blocks.title: Forbidden Blocks
forbidden_blocks.description:
Blocks that the mob can't jump to.

Sample values:
• frog: ["minecraft:water"]

max_velocity.title: Max Velocity
max_velocity.description:
The maximum velocity with which the mob can jump.

Sample values:
• frog: 1

minimum_distance.title: Minimum Distance
minimum_distance.description:
The minimum distance (in blocks) from the mob to a block, in order to consider jumping to it.

Sample values:
• frog: 1

minimum_path_length.title: Minimum Path Length
minimum_path_length.description:
The minimum length (in blocks) of the mobs path to a block, in order to consider jumping to it.

Sample values:
• frog: 2
• goat: 8

preferred_blocks.title: Preferred Blocks
preferred_blocks.description:
Blocks that the mob prefers jumping to.

Sample values:
• frog: ["minecraft:waterlily","minecraft:big_dripleaf"]

preferred_blocks_chance.title: Preferred Blocks Chance
preferred_blocks_chance.description:
Chance (between 0.0 and 1.0) that the mob will jump to a preferred block, if in range. Only matters if preferred blocks are defined.

Sample values:
• frog: 0.5

priority.title: Priority
priority.description:
As priority approaches 0, the priority is increased. The higher the priority, the sooner this behavior will be executed as a goal.

Sample values:
• frog: 10
• goat: 8

scale_factor.title: Scale Factor
scale_factor.description:
The scalefactor of the bounding box of the mob while it is jumping.

Sample values:
• frog: 0.6

search_height.title: Search Height
search_height.description:
The height (in blocks, in range [1, 15]) of the search box, centered around the mob.

Sample values:
• frog: 4
• goat: 10

search_width.title: Search Width
search_width.description:
The width (in blocks, in range [1, 15]) of the search box, centered around the mob.

Sample values:
• frog: 8
• goat: 10
